response.justification: The candidate has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tooling (test runners, CI/CD, fluent-asserts), and clear leadership through workshops and open-source projects, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership via open-source projects and workshops
Broad technical stack spanning mobile (iOS/TV), build systems, and cross-platform tooling
concerns: No clear documentation of formal people management or team leadership responsibilities
Limited evidence of mobile platform ecosystem experience beyond one iOS project
No mention of strategic roadmap planning or organizational change initiatives
